full_text: @Jonathan_Blow @nicbarkeragain An operating system lets users interface with the hardware, whereas a web browser lets users interface with web servers. full_text: @Jonathan_Blow @nicbarkeragain Then operating system vendors decided that you wouldn't be able to distribute native code without their blessing and a tithe, and browsers became the only permissionless way to distribute apps.
name: James

full_text:
@Jonathan_Blow @nicbarkeragain Browsers allow you to build software that
1. works against a unified API
2. that people can access from anywhere without installing it

Add more recent permissionless deployment advantages, and that's a HUGE advantage over native software, regardless of technical merits.

full_text: When you're trying to solve a bug, and the process is slow and takes a long time, often it's because you're confused, and some thing that you thought was true was actually not true, and it can take a long time to figure that out. Assertions reduce this kind of situation drastically, both in the evolution of the code (because things you thought were true, but weren't, get weeded out and fixed early) and during the debugging session (you can look at asserts and see textual reminders of what is known to be true right now).
name: Jonathan Blow
